notes: No new evidence found. All papers containing ivy cell evidence (PMID:20147544, PMID:21209836, PMID:28009257, PMID:37467748, PMID:39401246, PMID:41473287) are already in existing refs. Remaining papers in the corpus address other interneuron types (OLM, bistratified, PV basket, CCK basket, IS, HS) without substantive ivy cell data. The Sst;;Nos1 intersection in PMID:38640347 identifies oriens-oriens cells, not ivy cells (which are Lamp5+/nNOS+, not Sst+).
